tasks.subject: Task 1: lib/oidc.ts — pure gating + provider builder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dependency-light module deciding whether OIDC is configured and building the genericOAuth plugin, unit-testable from a plain env object.

**Files:**
- Create: lib/oidc.ts
- Test: tests/unit/oidc.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- isOidcConfigured(env) true only when all three OIDC vars non-empty
- oidcDiscoveryUrl strips trailing slash + appends /.well-known/openid-configuration
- oidcPlugins returns [] unconfigured / one generic-oauth plugin configured
- config uses providerId oidc, scopes openid/email/profile, pkce true

**Verify:** pnpm vitest run tests/unit/oidc.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/oidc.ts", "tests/unit/oidc.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm vitest run tests/unit/oidc.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isOidcConfigured true only when all three vars set", "oidcDiscoveryUrl strips trailing slash + appends well-known path", "oidcPlugins [] unconfigured / one generic-oauth configured", "config providerId oidc + openid/email/profile + pkce true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire OIDC into lib/auth.ts — linking policy + signup gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register OIDC conditionally, set link-by-IdP-verified-email policy (requireLocalEmailVerified:false, provider untrusted), disable self-service signup under SSO.

**Files:**
- Modify: lib/auth.ts
- Test: tests/unit/auth-oidc.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- accountLinking enabled true + requireLocalEmailVerified false
- trustedProviders excludes oidc
- env unset: no generic-oauth plugin + disableSignUp falsy
- env set: generic-oauth plugin present + disableSignUp true
- env set: auth.api.signUpEmail rejects

**Verify:** pnpm vitest run tests/unit/auth-oidc.test.ts tests/unit/auth.test.ts && rtk tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/auth.ts", "tests/unit/auth-oidc.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm vitest run tests/unit/auth-oidc.test.ts tests/unit/auth.test.ts && rtk tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["accountLinking enabled+requireLocalEmailVerified false", "trustedProviders excludes oidc", "env unset: no plugin + disableSignUp falsy", "env set: plugin present + disableSignUp true", "env set: signUpEmail rejects"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Client plugin + Sign in with SSO button
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose signIn.oauth2 via genericOAuthClient and render an SSO button on login when NEXT_PUBLIC_OIDC_ENABLED===true.

**Files:**
- Modify: lib/auth-client.ts
- Modify: app/login/page.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- authClient uses genericOAuthClient()
- SSO button shown only when NEXT_PUBLIC_OIDC_ENABLED===true
- button calls signIn.oauth2({providerId:oidc, callbackURL:/app, errorCallbackURL:/login?error=sso})
- password login unchanged

**Verify:** rtk tsc --noEmit && pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/auth-client.ts", "app/login/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "rtk tsc --noEmit && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["authClient uses genericOAuthClient()", "button shown only when flag true", "button calls signIn.oauth2 providerId oidc + callbackURL /app", "password login unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Guard app/register/page.tsx under SSO
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When SSO active, register page shows an SSO notice + /login link instead of the password form (mirrors server disableSignUp, D5a).

**Files:**
- Modify: app/register/page.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- flag set: SSO notice + /login link, no form
- flag unset: existing form unchanged

**Verify:** rtk tsc --noEmit && pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/register/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "rtk tsc --noEmit && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flag set: notice + /login link, no form", "flag unset: form unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: e2e default-state regression spec
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock default no-OIDC behavior: SSO button hidden, password login works, register form present.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/e2e/oidc.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- /login: no SSO button + password form present by default
- /register: form present (not SSO notice) by default
- file comment documents deferred enabled-path coverage (mock IdP)

**Verify:** pnpm playwright test tests/e2e/oidc.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/oidc.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm playwright test tests/e2e/oidc.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["login: no SSO button + password form", "register: form not notice", "comment documents deferred enabled path"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Documentation — .env.example + README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document optional SSO config + signup-disable side effect.

**Files:**
- Modify: .env.example
- Modify: README.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .env.example has four OIDC vars + signup-disable comment
- README Single sign-on section: vars, NEXT_PUBLIC_OIDC_ENABLED=true, redirect URI, linking + signup behavior, ADR link

**Verify:** grep -q OIDC_ISSUER .env.example && grep -qi "single sign-on" README.md

```json:metadata
{"files": [".env.example", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q OIDC_ISSUER .env.example && grep -qi \"single sign-on\" README.md && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": [".env.example four vars + comment", "README SSO section complete + ADR link"]}
```
